name: @yale-dissc/create-agent-sandbox
description: Interactive setup wizard for the DISSC agent-sandbox. Detects host dependencies, configures Bedrock or Claude.ai auth, scaffolds the project, and initializes git/GitHub.

scripts.test: node --test test/cli.test.js test/flags.test.js test/languages.test.js test/windows-env.test.js test/zprofile.test.js

author: Nicholas Warren <nick.warren@yale.edu>
